name: Yankee Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a round or eye roast for the recipe.
2. Place the roast in the slow cooker.
3. Pour one can of beef broth (15 oz) into the pot, removing it from its packaging first.
4. Add the prepared carrots, celery, and onions to the slow cooker.
5. Cook on low heat until the meat is tender and cooked through, typically for 8-10 hours.
6. To serve:
a. Slice the roast and serve with the vegetables as a side dish.
b. Alternatively, blend some of the cooked veggies and gravy from the pot to create a sauce or gravy to accompany the meal.
